title: The Sirians & the Council of Nine
summary: The Sirius lineage — its Council of 9, its dolphin people, and the leaders the sessions trace to its bloodline.
markdown:
The **Sirians** — the peoples of the Sirius system — run through the archive as lineage,
council, and kin. Their governing body, the **Sirian Council of 9**, appears in the February
2020 interviews in the archive's most quoted genealogy: Donald Trump, the sessions claim, is
*"a starseed, an Indigo being who comes from the organisation of the Sirian Council of 9"* —
an interdimensional lineage traced through the [Lyra](/lore/lyrans/) and [Vega](/lore/vega/)
civilizations, with "Archangel Michael lineage" besides. Whatever one makes of it, it shows
how the sessions read surface politics: as the visible edge of very old star-families.

Sirius is also a *place souls go*. The February 29 session traces the late researcher **Max
Spiers** to a new life — "a **Sirius B incarnation as a Healer Priest**" — one of the archive's
named [reincarnation](/lore/reincarnation/) cases. And Sirius has a people among us already:
the [Dolphin Race](/lore/dolphin-race/) introduces itself in 2024 as *"the dolphin race of
Sirian,"* placing the cetacean intelligence inside the Sirius family. The 500-million census
of "Lyran and Sirian" beings on Earth (April 2020) makes them among the most numerous of the
present lineages.

With the Pleiadian council, the Sirian councils are the [Andromedans'](/lore/andromedan-council/)
chosen intermediaries — the working diplomats of the high hierarchy, close enough to Earth to
touch its history, and, in the archive's telling, its bloodlines.
